title: Set of Plates with Lemon Vine Decor
description:
A full set of ceramic plates from our Piazzetta Collection — named after the small squares you find in every town along the Amalfi Coast. The set includes three sizes of plates: a large dinner plate, a medium plate, and a smaller side or dessert plate. Each one has a scalloped edge and the same hand-painted decoration.

The design features a deep cobalt blue border with a garland of lemons on the vine — bright yellow fruits with green leaves winding all the way around the rim. The centre is left clean with a white base and a warm yellow ring. It's a classic Amalfi Coast palette that looks fresh on any table, whether you're serving pasta or fruit.

Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare paint each plate individually by hand. The lemon vine pattern wraps around the border in a continuous flow, and because it's done freehand, every plate has its own subtle rhythm. The glazes are food-safe and dishwasher-friendly.

The set is designed for everyday use as well as special occasions. The scalloped edges give the plates a traditional feel without being too formal. If you need to expand the set later, individual plates from the Piazzetta Collection are available separately.
excerpt: A ceramic plate set with lemon vine decor on cobalt blue, in three sizes. Handpainted in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Lemon Vine Plate Set — Ceramiche Da Mario
